summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blogs4Blocks iteration 14 - Featured Carousel, Sponsored Posts, Advertise Page, and Admin Panel Extensions. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: GET /api/posts/featured/list returns 200 with list of featured posts - PASS
Featured posts have is_featured=True - PASS
Featured posts count is 7 (as per seed data) - PASS
Featured posts have all required fields (id, title, excerpt, category_slug, author_name, etc.) - PASS
Sponsored posts in featured list have is_sponsored=True - PASS
Sponsored posts have sponsor_name field (SEMrush, Mailchimp) - PASS
GET /api/advertise/stats returns community stats (total_posts, total_users, total_comments, newsletter_subscribers, total_countries) - PASS
Advertise stats values are reasonable (30+ posts, 25+ users, 15+ countries) - PASS
POST /api/advertise/inquiry accepts and stores inquiry - PASS
Inquiry validation rejects incomplete data (422) - PASS
PUT /api/admin/posts/{id}/feature toggles featured status (requires admin auth) - PASS
PUT /api/admin/posts/{id}/sponsor sets/removes sponsor info (requires admin auth) - PASS
GET /api/admin/ad-inquiries returns list of inquiries (requires admin auth) - PASS
PUT /api/admin/ad-inquiries/{id}/status updates inquiry status - PASS
Admin endpoints require authentication (401/403 without auth) - PASS
GET /api/stats returns correct values (30 posts, 27 users, 16 countries) - PASS
Homepage loads with Featured Carousel - PASS
Carousel shows '1/7' (7 featured posts) - PASS
Carousel has prev/next navigation arrows - PASS
Carousel has dot navigation - PASS
Sponsored badge visible in carousel for sponsored posts - PASS
Sponsor info 'Presented by Mailchimp' visible in carousel - PASS
Navbar has 'Advertise' link - PASS
Advertise page loads at /advertise - PASS
Advertise page has hero section with title 'Reach Marketing Professionals Worldwide' - PASS
Advertise page shows audience stats (30 Published Posts, 26 Contributors) - PASS
Advertise page has 3 advertising option cards - PASS
Advertise page has inquiry form with all required fields - PASS
Inquiry form submission works - success message shown - PASS
Footer has 'Advertise With Us' link - PASS
Post detail page shows 'Sponsored' badge for sponsored posts - PASS
Post detail page shows sponsor bar 'Presented by Mailchimp' - PASS
Admin panel loads for admin users - PASS
Admin panel has 'Featured & Sponsored' tab - PASS
Featured & Sponsored tab shows 7 Featured Posts, 2 Sponsored Posts stats - PASS
Featured & Sponsored tab lists all posts with Feature/Sponsor buttons - PASS
Admin panel has 'Inquiries' tab - PASS
Inquiries tab shows submitted inquiries with Contacted/Close actions - PASS
Homepage stats show 30 Posts, 27 Contributors, 16 Countries - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: FeaturedCarousel.js properly implements auto-rotation (5 seconds), prev/next navigation, and dot navigation
Sponsored posts correctly display sponsor badge and 'Presented by' branding in carousel and post detail
AdvertisePage.js has complete inquiry form with validation and success state
AdminPage.js has new 'featured' and 'inquiries' tabs with proper functionality
BlogCard.js shows sponsored badge for is_sponsored posts
PostPage.js shows sponsored badge and sponsor bar for sponsored posts
Backend routes properly implement featured/sponsor toggle and ad inquiry management
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Test inquiries created via POST /api/advertise/inquiry during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Featured Carousel displays 7 featured posts with auto-rotation, prev/next arrows, and dot navigation, 2) Sponsored posts (2 total - SEMrush and Mailchimp) show 'Sponsored' badge and 'Presented by' branding in carousel and post detail, 3) Advertise page at /advertise has hero, audience stats, advertising options, and inquiry form, 4) Admin panel has 'Featured & Sponsored' tab (shows 7 featured, 2 sponsored) and 'Inquiries' tab (shows submitted inquiries), 5) Homepage stats show 30 posts, 27 contributors, 16 countries. Previous features (pastel gradients, @mentions, deployment guide) still working.

featured_carousel.navigation: Prev/next arrows and dot navigation working

advertise_page.audience_stats: 5 stats: Posts, Contributors, Countries, Discussions, Newsletter Subs
advertise_page.advertising_options: 3 cards: Sponsored Posts, Featured Placement, Newsletter Inclusion
advertise_page.inquiry_form: Fields: company_name, contact_name, email, website, budget_range, message, preferred_categories

admin_panel_extensions.featured_tab: Shows featured/sponsored stats and post list with Feature/Sponsor buttons
admin_panel_extensions.inquiries_tab: Shows submitted inquiries with Contacted/Close actions

navbar_footer_links.footer: 'Advertise With Us' link in Quick Links section
